name: Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped eggs, green bell pepper, olives, and onions in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, blend together the mayonnaise, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the blended mixture to the tomato filling and stir until well combined.
4. Chill the mixture for at least 1 hour.
5. Cut each peeled tomato into three sections like petals, being careful not to cut all the way through.
6. Fill each tomato section with the chilled filling.
7. Top each stuffed tomato with a ripe olive on a toothpick.
Serves 6.
